services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Three tiers of experience. One standard of quality.

signature.name: Signature
signature.description: The Nailuxe standard in its purest form. For the woman who accepts no compromises.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Advanced techniques, exclusive finishes, and an extended care ritual.

atelier.name: Atelier
atelier.description: A personal consultation, a unique design, an unforgettable experience.

philosophy.title: Nailuxe is not a nail salon.
philosophy.subtitle: It is an atelier.
philosophy.body: Every client deserves more than an appointment. She deserves a ritual — carefully prepared, precisely executed, and designed so that she feels understood from the very first minute. That is the Nailuxe standard.

gallery.title: Artistry that speaks for itself
gallery.subtitle: Every design is one of a kind.

booking.note: All times are in Zürich time (CET/CEST).

gift.note: Gift cards are valid for 24 months and redeemable for all services.
